value: semiosis advanced primitives layer (2026-06-24 session 7). New modules: core/manifold_ops.py (frechet_mean Lorentz, twonn_intrinsic_dim Facco2017, lorentz_project); core/activation_predictor.py (NLA ActivationPredictor + stub_activations). New KnowledgeBase methods in core/agent_api.py: compress_hierarchy (info-bottleneck node pruning -> CompressedHierarchy), sense_complexity (TwoNN intrinsic dim -> ManifoldComplexity with suggested_octave), fold_budget (greedy token-budget RLM pattern -> FoldBudgetResult), sparse_search (NLA sparse mask -> list[SparseSearchResult]), optimal_octave (minimize energy s.t. entropy_budget), information_content (IC=-log2(aperture/pi)), ingest_stream (incremental -> IngestStreamResult), contrastive_direction (normalize(a-b) -> ContrastiveDirection), decompose_query (compound split -> QueryDecomposition), attention_score (softmax dot/sqrt(d) -> AttentionScore), find_analogy (A:B::C:X direction arithmetic -> AnalogyResult), concept_boundary (midpoint+normal+margin -> ConceptBoundary), entropy_dispel (auto-prune high-entropy -> DispelReport), build_digest_chain (bottom-up hierarchy summaries -> dict), compute_transition_matrix (P(octave_j|octave_i) -> dict). 191 tests pass (27 new in test_session7.py). Commit 04b2d64. Shape fixes: centroid length clamped in compress_hierarchy; inhomogeneous array fix in sense_complexity; empty centroid skip in attention_score.
